name: security-overhead-final-factorial
description: Reduced final security-overhead campaign across plaintext, TLS, and mTLS using the selected Kafka deployment and producer workload parameters.
implementation_notes: This is the reduced final campaign matrix: target_messages_per_second=5000 and batch_size=65536 are intentionally excluded.
The campaign contains 1728 runs per security mode and 5184 runs across plaintext, TLS, and mTLS.
broker_count changes require separate infrastructure phases; do not label a five-broker cluster as a three-broker run.
TLS and mTLS execution require their deployment modes to be implemented before non-plaintext rows can run.
Host CPU telemetry should be implemented before using this campaign for final dissertation evidence.
